We also have the first deal on Lenovo’s brand-new Legion Tab Gen 5 compact Android tablet at $185 off alongside its Tab Gen 3 Android tablet at $387 and Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra 1TB now $460 off – that’s $600 less than S26. The apps, however, await below.

items.title: Score Razer’s Minecraft Edition Cobra gaming mouse for your battlestation while it’s just $20 (All-time low)
items.summary:
As part of its wider sale gaming accessories, Woot is offering Razer’s Minecraft Edition Cobra gaming mouse for $29.99 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). You can use promo code RAZERWOOT during to checkout to save an additional $10 (as a new customer), dropping this mouse further down to $19.99 Prime shipped. That works out to a huge 63% markdown on its $55 usual going rate, marking the lowest we price we have tracked for it to date. This is, in fact, the lowest we have seen any variant of the Cobra gaming mouse fetch to date – including the standard black model, which has never dropped below the $28 mark. Head below for more details.

more…

items.title: HP OmniBook 3 Snapdragon X 2K touchscreen Copilot+ PC is $400 off (All-time low)
items.summary:
Update 06/02: HP’s OmniBook 3 14-inch Snapdragon X Copilot+ PC has dropped further down to $549.99 shipped. This is the lowest price we have tracked for this laptop, and you can learn more about it in our original post below.

As part of its Deals of the Day lineup, Best Buy is now offering HP’s OmniBook 3 Copilot+ PC powered by Qualcomm’s Snapdragon X for $579.99 shipped. This particular model from HP’s OmniBook 3 lineup normally carries a $950 price tag, but today’s offer knocks $370 off to make it easier on your wallet. We’ve previously seen the AMD-powered variant of this laptop go for less, but this is the lowest we have seen this model fetch to date. It doesn’t get much less than this for a touchscreen 2K laptop, so be sure to grab this while the offer is live.

more…

items.title: Pick up some of Acer’s Thunderbolt 4 cables for $16 a pop (20% off)
items.summary:
Acer USB/Thunderbolt 4 240W 40Gb/s Cable

Buy for $16 (Reg. $20)

What we love

While you can find 60W and even 240W charging cables for quite a bit less than this, the price goes up tremendously once you want something with USB4 and Thunderbolt data transfer speeds. At $16 Prime shipped for an Acer-made solution, this is a price worth considering if you want a well-rounded cable for your bag or tech bin.

UGREEN’s new FineTrack 2 tracker works with Apple’s Find My network, making it easy to keep tabs on your everyday essentials. It’s not rechargeable, but UGREEN claims the built-in battery can last for up to seven years.

Normally going for $380 at full price, we’ve been seeing this model consistently discounted down to $250 throughout 2026.
